sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block positions and icon
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Orange/Blue nodes (gameplay):")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'b'] and n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check white cross
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  White node: pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check bottom-left icon area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBottom-left icon (rows 55-60, cols 1-9):")
for i in range(55, 61):
    print(f"  Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][1:9]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
